Selected Work Snapshots

Hubtel · Relationship Work

Reduced retailer cancellations through structured support

  • Challenge: Frequent partner readiness issues and order cancellations.
  • Action: Daily communication, proactive support, and readiness checks with partner merchants.
  • Result: Retailer cancellations reduced from 20% to 8%.
View supporting write-up

Hubtel · Merchant Enablement

Supported migration from basic channels to better digital flows

  • Challenge: Some merchants were limited by older payment workflow setups.
  • Action: Guided businesses on product usage, onboarding, and operational adoption.
  • Result: Smoother merchant payment processes and stronger product usage confidence.
View supporting write-up

Cross-Functional Roles

Built execution discipline across operations, QA, and HR support

  • Challenge: Different roles required different standards and pace.
  • Action: Applied careful documentation, testing discipline, and clear communication.
  • Result: Reliable delivery habits that now shape my business growth approach.
View supporting write-up
